members.name: Scott Schindler
members.title: Founder & Healthcare CISO | AI Developer | GRC Leader
members.organization: Aesop AI Academy / Govern AI Now
members.bio:
Scott Schindler is a 30-year cybersecurity and AI veteran, serial entrepreneur, U.S. military veteran, and the founder of both Aesop AI Academy and Govern AI Now (GAIN). He has served as CISO for multiple community health networks — including LifeLong Medical Care, Community Medical Centers, and Asian Health Services — building HIPAA compliance programs, incident response operations, and vendor risk programs from the ground up on nonprofit budgets.

As a practitioner-turned-builder, Scott personally developed the full-stack platforms behind Aesop AI Academy (43 courses, 7 languages, patent-pending AESOP Engine — App #64/018,565) and GAIN, a multi-tenant AI governance program builder that turns frameworks like NIST AI RMF and the EU AI Act into operational workflows. He previously led Managed Security Services at Booz Allen Hamilton, served as a Field CISO at Inspira Enterprise, and taught the Security Management capstone at Collin College.

Scott brings rare depth across the full GRC and AI governance stack — policy, platform, and people — and is deeply invested in making AI literacy and AI governance accessible to organizations that cannot afford to get either one wrong.
members.degree: AA — General Studies, Tarrant County College | U.S. Military Veteran

members.name: Amir Habib
members.title: Managing Partner
members.bio:
Amir Habib is an executive leader in AI and digital strategy with a distinguished track record of driving large-scale transformation across some of the world's most complex enterprise environments — from Fortune 500 corporations to pioneering global technology firms. He brings deep expertise in intelligent automation, AI-enabled operations, and digital service delivery solutions to deliver measurable, lasting business outcomes.

He is especially passionate about harnessing AI to unlock efficiency at scale, elevate organizational decision-making, and build future-ready operating models.
members.degree: MIT - Executive Education in Digital Transformation / CTU - BSBA Finance and International Business / SMU - Lyle School of Engineering and Applied Science

members.name: Michael Madero
members.title: VP Information Security
members.bio: Michael is a senior Information Security executive with more than two decades of experience leading large scale identity, access, and security transformation across financial services, healthcare, and aviation. Known for elevating enterprise security posture while enabling business agility, Michael has built a reputation as a trusted advisor to senior leadership and a catalyst for modernization in complex, highly regulated environments.  As Vice President of Information Security at Mr. Cooper, Michael leads the enterprise Identity and Access Management program.

members.name: Richard Lightcap
members.credentials: PhD, EdD, CISSP, CISA, CISM, CEH, MCSE
members.title: Dean of Information Technology & Associate Director, Cybersecurity
members.bio: Dr. Richard Lightcap is a cybersecurity leader, researcher, and educator specializing in AI-driven security operations, network security engineering, and enterprise risk governance. His work focuses on the intersection of artificial intelligence and cybersecurity, with an emphasis on workforce transformation, decision-making, and modern security architectures. He is the author of The AI-Driven CISO: Executive Strategies for Modern Cybersecurity Leadership, and Leading in the Age of Intelligent Systems, and contributes to advancing AI literacy and cybersecurity education.

members.name: Mike Allen
members.title: Chief Revenue Officer
members.bio: Mike Allen, Co-Founder & CRO of CoreSense, brings 20+ years of sales leadership in Cybersecurity and Digital Health, with experience scaling early-stage startups, leading capital raises at Elemental Cyber Security, and holding leadership roles at Opango Inc., Divergence Academy, and Hcare Inc. He has built and led cross-functional direct and channel sales teams, driving revenue growth and strategic partnerships across multiple markets.

members.name: Jesus Hernandez
members.title: Educator & AI Learning Designer
members.bio:
Jesus Hernandez is a middle school science educator and AI learning designer with over a decade of experience in the classroom. He has served in leadership roles including department chair, curriculum development, and instructional program support, with a strong focus on improving outcomes for diverse learners.

His work centers on rethinking how students engage with complex concepts—shifting from passive content to guided, interactive learning experiences. Drawing from both general and special education backgrounds, he brings a deep understanding of accessibility, student thinking, and real c

members.name: Kedralyn Folk
members.title: Artificial Intelligence Educator
members.bio: Dr. Kedralyn L. Folk is an AI Educator at the University of South Carolina. She has expertise in instructional innovation, educational technology, and systems-level improvement. A native of Ehrhardt, South Carolina, she holds degrees from South Carolina State University, the University of South Carolina, Coastal Carolina University, and Clemson University. Before joining USC, she led K-12, district-wide innovation initiatives integrating technology, design thinking, and artificial intelligence. Her work centers on ethical, meaningful, and responsible AI integration in education.
members.degree: Doctor of Education in Education Systems Improvement Science

members.name: Matthew Stepnowsky
members.title: Founder & Principal Consultant
members.bio: I'm a 24-year educator with an M.Ed. in secondary education from Providence College and an M.Ed. in administration from the University of Notre Dame. Most of my career has been in Catholic and independent high schools most recently serving as principal. I'm drawn to AI draws because it's a forcing function that is causes us to ask difficult questions about teaching and learning and providing opportunities for what the future of education can be for our students and teachers.
members.degree: Masters in Education Administration, University of Notre Dame

members.name: Gizem Yılmaz
members.title: AI in Education Strategist | Learning Design & Digital Transformation
members.organization: Kadıköy Anadolu Lisesi Eğitim Vakfı Okulları
members.bio:
I am an AI in Education Specialist working at the intersection of pedagogy, technology, and human-centered learning. I design AI-powered learning experiences, support digital transformation in schools, and train educators to use AI ethically and effectively.
My work spans K-12, higher education, and adult learning, focusing on inclusive, age-appropriate, and future-ready programs. I collaborate with institutions, educators, and organizations to advance AI literacy and innovation.
I contribute through consulting, curriculum design, and professional development, and serve in AI-focused education

members.name: Amanda Kollmorgan
members.title: Deputy State IT Director
members.bio: Amanda Kollmorgan serves as the Deputy State IT Director for the Wisconsin Department of Military Affairs. She also volunteers as an Incident Response Lead for the WI Cyber Response Team and serves as the NCOIC of the WI Defensive Cyber Operations Element. With nearly 20 years of combined military and civilian experience, Amanda brings deep expertise in cybersecurity, IT strategy, leadership, and innovation.

members.name: Susan Levaque
members.title: Secondary Education Teacher Biology, Chemistry, and Social Studies (online) | Curriculum Writer | AI Technology
members.bio: I’m an educator, instructional designer, and educational technology specialist with extensive experience teaching both online and in person. I have extensive experience integrating AI and digital tools into curriculum for K–12, higher education, and adult learners, while differentiating and personalizing instruction to meet diverse learner needs.

members.name: Khet Kumar
members.title: AI & Robotics Author | AI & STEAM Curriculum Desinger | Founder Red Pi
members.bio: Khet Kumar is an educationist, author, and EdTech entrepreneur with over a decade of experience in early childhood and K–12 education. He is the founder of Red Pi, an EdTech company leading the integration of STEAM, AI, and Robotics in schools across the globe. Khet has introduced an AI and STEAM curriculum for the early years, focusing on the safe use of technology, aiming to build future-ready skills from the start. He also empowers educators through his Teacher AI Literacy Program and consults with schools to implement innovative, scalable education solutions.
